title: Shakti Steel wins large infra order
snippet: The company announced a new supply order for metro rail project, supporting growth outlook.

title: UrbanNest Realty faces NCLT petition
snippet: A contractor filed a petition citing delayed payments; management plans settlement.

snippet: Order book improves with new highway project, supporting revenue visibility.

title: Textile exporters see margin pressure
snippet: Sector outlook cautious as raw material costs rise and EU demand softens.

snippet: Regulatory audit completed without observations, lifting sector sentiment.

title: Electronics suppliers face working capital crunch
snippet: Industry reports delayed receivables and higher inventory days.

title: Chemical maker sees capacity expansion
snippet: Expansion to add 20% capacity with focus on export orders.

title: Healthcare demand steady despite pricing controls
snippet: Domestic pharma demand remains stable; pricing pressures persist.

title: RBI flags credit concentration in real estate
snippet: Regulator reiterates cautious stance on construction finance and NCLT exposure.

title: Shakti Steel reports stable quarterly profit
snippet: Stable margins and improved collections reported in FY24 Q4.
